faq.question: What is Graphura and where is it located?
faq.answer: Graphura India Private Limited is a branding, marketing, and custom software solutions company based in Gurugram, Haryana, serving primarily international clients.

faq.question: Where can I find official internship information?
faq.answer: Official internship details are available on graphura.online and graphura.in and on the company’s LinkedIn and Instagram pages.

faq.question: How can I apply for an internship at Graphura?
faq.answer: Apply through the form posted on the official website or through listed internship/job portals where Graphura advertises opportunities. Ensure your CV and portfolio are ready.

faq.question: What is the official HR contact email?
faq.answer: HR: hr@graphura.in. Official company email: official@graphura.in.

faq.question: What should I do if I face onboarding issues?
faq.answer: Contact your assigned Team Head first. If unresolved, escalate to HR at hr@graphura.in.

faq.question: Where can I apply for leave?
faq.answer: Apply for leaves from https://www.graphura.online/form/leave.html

faq.question: What is the internship duration?
faq.answer: Internships commonly run 3–6 months depending on the role. Specific duration will be mentioned in your offer details.

faq.question: What internship domains are available at Graphura?
faq.answer: Graphura offers internships across 14 domains including Digital Marketing, Graphic Design, Video Editing, UI/UX, Content Writing, Frontend, Backend, MERN/Full-Stack, Data Science & Analytics, Social Media Management, Sales & Marketing, Email & Outreach, Human Resources, and others.

faq.question: Will interns work on real or live projects?
faq.answer: Yes — interns are assigned to live projects for real-world exposure.

faq.question: Is the internship paid or unpaid?
faq.answer: The internship is primarily unpaid. Some domains or project-based contributions may have stipend provisions based on performance and sales.

faq.question: Can the internship convert into a job opportunity?
faq.answer: Exceptional interns may receive placement offers at Graphura. Every candidate is provided a placement opportunity.

faq.question: What are the working hours and days?
faq.answer: Graphura follows a 5-day week (Monday–Friday). Typical virtual timing is 5:00 PM – 9:00 PM. Sundays are off.

faq.question: Are daily meetings conducted?
faq.answer: No — daily meetings are not conducted. Meetings are scheduled in the Planner according to departments.

faq.question: What happens if I am late to a meeting?
faq.answer: Professional punctuality is expected. Repeated delays may lead to warnings as per disciplinary rules.

faq.question: How many leaves are allowed during the internship?
faq.answer: 3-month internship: 10 days. 4-month internship: 12 days. 6-month internship: 25 days.

faq.question: How do I apply for leave?
faq.answer: Apply 48 hours in advance with documents. Emergency leave requires immediate intimation. Use the official leave form.

faq.question: What is considered unauthorized leave?
faq.answer: 3 consecutive days without approval is treated as unauthorized and may lead to termination.

faq.question: What is the policy for sick or emergency leave?
faq.answer: Yes — inform your senior immediately and submit documents if requested.

faq.question: What happens if I exceed my leave quota?
faq.answer: Exceeding quota may affect certificate eligibility or require extension.

faq.question: Is there a notice period during internship?
faq.answer: A 1-month notice period is required.

faq.question: Who do I report to daily?
faq.answer: Report to your Team Head for daily tasks. Hierarchy: Intern → Team Head → Team Leader → Manager. Only escalate to HR if unresolved.

faq.question: Can I message seniors privately outside official channels?
faq.answer: No — all official communication should happen within assigned official groups/email. Private messaging without permission is discouraged.

faq.question: What if there is a grievance with my Team Head?
faq.answer: Follow hierarchy: raise the issue to the next level. If unresolved, escalate to HR (hr@graphura.in). Avoid informal gossip channels.

faq.question: What are the expectations around deadlines?
faq.answer: Deadline commitment is non-negotiable—complete tasks on or before deadlines. Missing multiple deadlines may result in leave deductions or disciplinary action.

faq.question: What happens if I miss deadlines?
faq.answer: Missing 2 consecutive deadlines may lead to a 1-day leave deduction; missing 3 or more deadlines can result in termination as per policy.

faq.question: How is performance evaluated?
faq.answer: Performance is evaluated on task quality, deadline adherence, communication, teamwork, and contributions to projects. Top performers may receive LORs or placement offers.

faq.question: How do I get feedback?
faq.answer: Feedback is provided by your Team Head during reviews and project wrap-ups. Ask for periodic feedback from your reporting head if you want more guidance.

faq.question: What is the file or assignment submission process?
faq.answer: Submit assignments via the official channel/platform specified by your Team Head (e.g., company Drive, project management tool, or email). Follow naming and versioning guidelines provided by your team.

faq.question: Which interns are eligible for stipends?
faq.answer: Some domains or specific project contributions (e.g., those that lead to a sale) may have stipend provisions. Stipends are performance/project-based and not guaranteed. Exact terms are shared per project.

faq.question: How are project sales shared with interns?
faq.answer: If an intern contributes to a client sale (e.g., a website sale), a percentage is shared among contributors — the split is decided based on contribution and Team Head agreement.

faq.question: When and how are stipends or incentives paid?
faq.answer: Payment methods and schedules (if applicable) are communicated by HR/Accounts per project. Always request written confirmation for any stipend-related agreement.

faq.question: Will I get a certificate after the internship?
faq.answer: Yes — an ICC Certificate is provided upon successful completion.

faq.question: How can I get a Letter of Recommendation (LOR)?
faq.answer: LORs are awarded to outstanding performers; demonstrate strong performance, reliability, and initiative to be considered.

faq.question: How are placement or pre-placement offers handled?
faq.answer: Exceptional interns may receive placement offers at Graphura; average performers may be referred to partner HR firms. But everyone will have the opportunity to get placement.

faq.question: What are the professional conduct expectations?
faq.answer: Maintain discipline, respect all team members, meet deadlines, and communicate professionally. Disrespect or unprofessional behaviour may lead to disciplinary measures.

faq.question: Is there a dress code?
faq.answer: Professional dress is required for official meetings. Follow the team’s instructions for meetings.

faq.question: Can I post about Graphura on social media?
faq.answer: Do not post company-related content publicly without prior approval. Negative or unapproved posts are subject to disciplinary action.

faq.question: Can I create unofficial groups using the company name?
faq.answer: No. Unapproved groups using the company name or logo are not permitted.

faq.question: Can I share client data or company files outside Graphura?
faq.answer: No — client or company data must not be shared externally. Breach of confidentiality may lead to legal action.

faq.question: Who owns the work I create during the internship?
faq.answer: Work produced for Graphura during the internship is company property. Interns should assume IP/rights belong to the company.

faq.question: What tools will I use during the internship?
faq.answer: Tools vary by domain (e.g., Adobe/Canva for design, code editors for developers, analytics tools for marketing). Team Heads will provide access and training.

faq.question: Will Graphura provide software licenses or accounts?
faq.answer: The company provides access to required company tools/accounts for project work. Personal licenses may not be provided — check with your Team Head.

faq.question: Can I work remotely?
faq.answer: The program is virtual. Follow the set timings, attend meetings, and maintain availability as required by your domain/team.

faq.question: Are there training resources available?
faq.answer: Yes — interns get hands-on tool exposure, workshops, and guidance during the program; check internal resources shared by your Team Head.

faq.question: Can I reuse content from the web?
faq.answer: All work must be original and plagiarism-free. Copying others’ work is prohibited and may lead to termination.

faq.question: How are creative assignments judged?
faq.answer: On originality, alignment with the brief, quality, and meeting deadlines. Seek clarifications before starting if the brief is unclear.

faq.question: What is the Saturday Club Meeting?
faq.answer: A cross-domain session with guest speakers from diverse fields sharing experiences; debates for interns and every candidate can participate; and sometimes fun sessions are conducted. It’s part of the learning culture. Attendance is expected.

faq.question: Are there workshops or guest lectures?
faq.answer: Yes — Graphura schedules sessions, workshops, and guest talks as part of the club and learning activities.

faq.question: What actions can lead to termination?
faq.answer: Behavioural issues, repeated missed deadlines, unauthorized leave, serious misconduct, or breach of confidentiality can lead to immediate termination. Terminated candidates cannot reapply for 6 months.

faq.question: Is there a warning system?
faq.answer: Yes — usually warnings are issued before major action, though serious violations may lead to immediate termination.

faq.question: Will my college be informed if I am terminated?
faq.answer: In cases of unauthorized prolonged absence or serious misconduct, Graphura may notify your college.

faq.question: How do I file a grievance?
faq.answer: Raise it first with your senior or Team Head. If unresolved, escalate to HR (hr@graphura.in). Avoid informal or gossip channels.

faq.question: What legal steps does Graphura take for serious violations?
faq.answer: For breaches such as data leakage or serious misconduct, Graphura may initiate legal action (as described in the disciplinary policy).

faq.question: Where can I see Graphura’s public work or updates?
faq.answer: Follow Graphura on LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, X, Reddit, YouTube etc for updates, tutorials, and examples of work. The website contains service descriptions and career pages.

faq.question: Does Graphura post internship openings externally?
faq.answer: Yes — openings are posted on the official website, LinkedIn, and internship portals where Graphura lists roles.

faq.question: How do I record my attendance?
faq.answer: Follow the attendance process communicated by your Team Head (could be via official group check-in or a time-tracking tool). Confirm with your team.

faq.question: Are reimbursements available for internship costs?
faq.answer: Routine reimbursements aren’t standard for virtual internships; if any reimbursement is applicable it will be communicated per project and pre-approved. Always get written approval.

faq.question: Can I work on personal projects during the internship?
faq.answer: Personal projects must not use company resources or conflict with your Graphura duties. Disclose any potential conflicts to your Team Head.

faq.question: Will I get references after leaving?
faq.answer: Good performers may receive Letters of Recommendation or references from Team Heads—request these before exit and ensure your work record is clean.

faq.question: What documents are required for onboarding?
faq.answer: Typically CV, college ID, and signed internship agreement (if applicable).

faq.question: As a design intern, what tools should I be familiar with?
faq.answer: Familiarity with Canva and Adobe Creative Cloud (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) is preferred; Team Heads may assign tool-specific guidance.

faq.question: As a developer intern, what stack will I use?
faq.answer: Depending on placement — frontend, backend, MERN/full-stack — expect tools like React, Node, Express, MongoDB, and code editors. Team Heads provide project specifics.

faq.question: As a marketing intern, what metrics will I work with?
faq.answer: Campaign KPIs, reach, engagement, CTR, conversions, SEO metrics, and analytics dashboards — you’ll gain hands-on exposure.

faq.question: When and how will I receive my internship certificate?
faq.answer: Certificates (ICC) are issued after successful completion and meeting attendance/performance criteria. Delivery method (digital/PDF or hardcopy) will be communicated by HR.

faq.question: How long after internship end do I get my LOR or certificate?
faq.answer: Typically after exit formalities are complete and performance checks are done. Confirm exact timelines with HR during exit.

faq.question: Can I stay in touch after internship?
faq.answer: Yes — Graphura encourages networking; outstanding interns may be kept in touch for future openings or offered PPOs. Follow company social accounts for alumni updates.

faq.question: What if I lose access to an official account or tool?
faq.answer: Report immediately to your Team Head and IT/HR so access can be restored. Do not try to access accounts beyond your permission.

faq.question: Can I request change of domain mid-internship?
faq.answer: Domain changes are not encouraged. If you want to do it, inform your Team Head and you will be notified about the procedure. In most cases, you may need to appear for the interview again.

faq.question: Will Graphura run background or reference checks?
faq.answer: If converting to employment, standard pre-employment/reference checks may apply. For internships, ID/college verification is typical.

faq.question: Where can I find help articles or tutorials from Graphura?
faq.answer: Follow Graphura’s LinkedIn, Instagram, and website blog pages — they post creative tutorials and tips periodically.

faq.question: What is the Intern Verification Portal?
faq.answer: The Intern Verification Portal is an official tool on the Graphura website where interns can securely check their internship status, performance records, and completion validity using their Unique Verification ID.

faq.question: Where can I access the verification portal?
faq.answer: You can access it on the official website at graphura.online/verify.html under the 'Intern Verification' section.

faq.question: How is verification done?
faq.answer: Verification is done only through your Unique Verification ID assigned at the time of certificate generation or post-verification by HR.

faq.question: Should I share my Unique Verification ID with others?
faq.answer: Sharing your Unique Verification ID is not encouraged. Only share it when an institution, employer, or authorized person specifically asks for verification.

faq.question: What information can I see on the verification portal?
faq.answer: You can view your internship details such as your name, internship domain, internship duration, completion status, verification status, certificate ID (if issued), and performance summary.

faq.question: Who can verify my internship through the portal?
faq.answer: Only individuals who have your Unique Verification ID can check your verification status. Without the ID, no one can access your information.

faq.question: I completed my internship but my verification is not showing. What should I do?
faq.answer: If your status is not updated, contact the HR team at hr@graphura.in with your registered email, name, and internship details for manual updating.

faq.question: Can I check whether my internship certificate is genuine using the portal?
faq.answer: Yes — enter your Unique Verification ID on the portal to confirm the authenticity of your certificate.

faq.question: Will my college or employer need my Unique Verification ID for cross-verification?
faq.answer: Yes, if your college or employer wants to verify your internship, you must provide your Unique Verification ID. Only share it when required.

faq.question: Can I update my details on the verification portal?
faq.answer: No, interns cannot update their own verification information. For changes or corrections, contact HR.

faq.question: What is the Planner page on the website?
faq.answer: The Planner is a centralized schedule dashboard where interns can check all upcoming meetings, domain sessions, workshops, deadlines, and weekly activities.

faq.question: Where can I access the Planner?
faq.answer: The Planner is available at www.graphura.online/planner.html on the official Graphura website.

faq.question: What events are shown in the Planner?
faq.answer: Daily meetings, domain-specific sessions, weekly club meetings, guest lectures, project deadlines, and special events or announcements.

faq.question: How often is the Planner updated?
faq.answer: The Planner is updated regularly by the management/HR team whenever new meetings, events, or deadlines are added or modified.

faq.question: Can I access the Planner without logging in?
faq.answer: The Planner is publicly visible, but full meeting details or internal notes may be accessible only to active interns.

faq.question: What if I miss a meeting shown on the Planner?
faq.answer: Missing scheduled meetings without approved leave may be counted as absence or lead to disciplinary action depending on your department policy.

faq.question: Can I download or export the schedule from the Planner?
faq.answer: You can sync your phone calendar with it so that you can check it easily, or use the link available in your group description.

faq.question: If I change domains, will my meeting schedule change in the Planner?
faq.answer: The Planner is centralized so you can check every meeting at one place, so there is no need to update that.

faq.question: Who maintains the Planner?
faq.answer: The Planner is maintained by the Graphura admin/HR team, with inputs from Team Heads and Managers.

faq.question: Is the Planner available after I complete my internship?
faq.answer: The Planner is active for current interns. Once your internship ends, you may not see future schedules but can still view public information.

faq.question: I lost my Unique Verification ID. What do I do?
faq.answer: Contact HR at hr@graphura.in with your registered email to retrieve your ID.

faq.question: Can someone misuse my Unique Verification ID?
faq.answer: No personal information is exposed. The ID only shows internship verification details. Still, sharing your ID only when required is recommended.

faq.question: Does the verification portal show my performance rating?
faq.answer: Yes — performance indicators or remarks may be shown depending on your department’s evaluation system.

faq.question: Will the portal show if I was terminated?
faq.answer: The portal only shows verified details. If you are terminated, the status will be shown as terminated.

faq.question: Can I check my attendance through the verification portal?
faq.answer: No — attendance logs are handled internally. The portal only verifies internship authenticity and performance summaries.

faq.question: When will my Unique Verification ID be generated?
faq.answer: IDs are generated after successful completion, verification, and internal approval.

faq.question: Can non-intern users access the Planner?
faq.answer: Yes, but they will only see the general schedule, not department-specific internal details.

faq.question: Why is my Planner not showing updated meetings?
faq.answer: Try refreshing the page. If still outdated, your Team Head may not have updated the details yet.

faq.question: Will the Planner show national holidays or company holidays?
faq.answer: Yes — major holidays or days with no meetings will usually be reflected.

faq.question: Can I rely fully on the Planner for attendance and tasks?
faq.answer: The Planner helps with scheduling, but you must still follow instructions from your Team Head and official HR communications.

faq.question: What services does Graphura provide?
faq.answer: Graphura provides branding, marketing, graphic design, video editing, website development, UI/UX, digital advertising, and complete brand-building solutions for businesses.

faq.question: Do you work with startups or only established brands?
faq.answer: We work with startups, SMEs, and enterprise brands. Our services are flexible and customizable for all stages of business growth.

faq.question: Do you provide customized branding packages?
faq.answer: Yes — every branding package is customized based on your industry, target audience, creative needs, and brand personality.

faq.question: Do you build websites too?
faq.answer: Yes, we build modern, responsive, and SEO-friendly websites including portfolio sites, e-commerce solutions, landing pages, and custom web platforms.

faq.question: Do you provide content writing as well?
faq.answer: Yes — Graphura provides website content, ad copies, captions, blogs, scripts, and marketing content depending on the project.

faq.question: Can Graphura handle my company’s social media completely?
faq.answer: Yes — we offer complete social media management, including strategy, content creation, posting, ad campaigns, and analytics.

faq.question: Can I get a complete branding, website, and marketing solution from one place?
faq.answer: Absolutely — we offer all-in-one brand transformation packages designed to build your brand from scratch.

faq.question: Do you provide video ads or animated videos?
faq.answer: Yes — we create reels, product videos, promotional ads, explainer videos, motion graphics, and animated clips.

faq.question: Do you create logos, brand identity, and brand guidelines?
faq.answer: Yes — we provide professional brand identity packages including logo, color schemes, typography, visual strategy, and brand guidelines.

faq.question: Do you help in running advertisements?
faq.answer: Yes — we run and manage Meta (Facebook/Instagram), YouTube, and Google Ads along with analytical reporting.

faq.question: Can you redesign my existing brand visuals?
faq.answer: Yes — we offer brand revamp and modernization services while maintaining your core identity.

faq.question: Do you work internationally?
faq.answer: Yes — Graphura works with clients globally, especially in the international market.

faq.question: Can I get a consultation call to understand what package suits me?
faq.answer: Yes — you can book a consultation call with our branding strategy team through our website or by contacting us directly.

faq.question: Do you provide campaign strategy or only designs?
faq.answer: We provide full campaign strategy, design, and execution based on your goals.

faq.question: Can you work with my internal marketing team?
faq.answer: Yes — we collaborate seamlessly with in-house teams to improve workflow and brand output.

faq.question: What are your pricing packages?
faq.answer: Pricing depends on project scope. After understanding your requirements, we provide a transparent and customized quote.

faq.question: Do you offer monthly retainers?
faq.answer: Yes — we offer monthly retainer packages for brands needing continuous content or marketing support.

faq.question: Can I get a detailed proposal for my project?
faq.answer: Absolutely — once we understand your brand needs, we prepare a detailed proposal including deliverables, timelines, and pricing.

faq.question: Do you require advance payment?
faq.answer: Yes — most projects require a partial upfront payment to initiate work.

faq.question: Do you sign contracts or MoUs?
faq.answer: Yes — for formal engagements, we provide a service agreement outlining scope, timelines, and responsibilities.

faq.question: Can I negotiate pricing?
faq.answer: Pricing is structured based on workload and resources, but we can discuss flexible packages depending on requirements.

faq.question: Do you offer refunds?
faq.answer: Refunds depend on the project stage and agreement terms. Details are mentioned in the service contract.

faq.question: How do I pay?
faq.answer: We accept payments through bank transfer, UPI, and other digital modes depending on region.

faq.question: Do you provide EMI or installment options?
faq.answer: For large projects, installment-based payment structures are available during milestone delivery.

faq.question: Are taxes included in the package price?
faq.answer: Taxes are applied as applicable and will be mentioned clearly in the invoice.

faq.question: Is there any hidden cost?
faq.answer: No — all costs are communicated upfront in the proposal.

faq.question: Can I get a sample or trial before placing an order?
faq.answer: We don’t provide trials, but you can check our portfolio and previous client work.

faq.question: Can you work under an NDA?
faq.answer: Yes — we respect privacy and can sign NDAs when required.

faq.question: Will you give me the source files?
faq.answer: Yes — source files can be included depending on the package selected.

faq.question: How soon can you start on my project?
faq.answer: Once the proposal is approved and advance payment is completed, the project starts immediately.

faq.question: How long does it take to complete a branding project?
faq.answer: Depending on complexity, branding projects take 7–21 days typically.

faq.question: How long does website development take?
faq.answer: A standard website takes 15–30 days; advanced systems require more time.

faq.question: How many revisions will I get?
faq.answer: Revision limits depend on the selected package. We ensure you get exactly what your brand needs.

faq.question: What if I don’t like the first draft?
faq.answer: We refine it based on your feedback until it aligns with your brand guidelines within the revision scope.

faq.question: Do you follow a project timeline?
faq.answer: Yes — each project follows a structured timeline with milestones.

faq.question: How will I receive my files?
faq.answer: Files are shared via Google Drive or secure cloud links.

faq.question: Will I get all versions of the logo?
faq.answer: Yes — you receive multiple formats (PNG, JPG, PDF, SVG) and color variations.

faq.question: Do you support multilingual designs?
faq.answer: Yes — we can create designs in multiple languages based on your needs.

faq.question: Can you manage my ads after delivering the creatives?
faq.answer: Yes — we offer ad management as an add-on service.

faq.question: Will you maintain my website after delivery?
faq.answer: Yes — maintenance packages are available monthly or quarterly.

faq.question: Can you design packaging as well?
faq.answer: Yes — packaging design is part of our brand identity services.

faq.question: Do you deliver editable design files?
faq.answer: Editable files can be included in higher-tier packages.

faq.question: Can I track project progress?
faq.answer: Yes — we share progress through regular updates, milestones, and meetings.

faq.question: What if my project needs urgent delivery?
faq.answer: We offer fast-track delivery at an additional charge.

faq.question: Can I request old project files later?
faq.answer: Yes — we maintain backup for a specific duration; you can request past files.

faq.question: Do you work on festive or campaign-based designs?
faq.answer: Yes — we provide seasonal, festive, and promotional content.

faq.question: Can I request multiple services together?
faq.answer: Yes — bundled packages are available for branding + website + marketing.

faq.question: Do you provide monthly content buckets?
faq.answer: Yes — monthly content and marketing calendars are provided under SMM packages.

faq.question: Can I schedule meetings with your team during the project?
faq.answer: Yes — you can request meetings anytime based on your project requirements.

faq.question: How do you handle feedback and approvals?
faq.answer: Feedback is taken through scheduled calls, WhatsApp groups, or email, and approvals are documented before final delivery.

faq.question: What communication channels do you use?
faq.answer: We communicate via WhatsApp, email, Google Meet, and official communication channels.

faq.question: How do I get support after project completion?
faq.answer: You can reach us through support or account managers assigned to your project.

faq.question: What is your response time?
faq.answer: Typical response time is 1–12 hours, depending on workload.

faq.question: Do you provide 24/7 support?
faq.answer: Support hours depend on your package; premium support includes extended hours.

faq.question: Will my project data remain confidential?
faq.answer: Yes — all files and business information remain strictly confidential.

faq.question: Can I hire Graphura for long-term brand management?
faq.answer: Yes — long-term partnerships and retainers are available.

faq.question: Do you use AI tools in your work?
faq.answer: We combine human creativity with advanced tools for the best results — always ensuring originality.

faq.question: Do you outsource your work?
faq.answer: No — our in-house experts handle all projects to maintain quality.

faq.question: Will my brand have a dedicated manager?
faq.answer: Yes — for medium and large projects, a dedicated project manager is assigned.

faq.question: Do you provide after-sales service?
faq.answer: Yes — depending on the agreement, you receive support for updates, edits, or maintenance.

faq.question: How do I report any issues?
faq.answer: You can report issues to your assigned manager or through official support channels.

faq.question: What industries have you worked with?
faq.answer: We’ve worked with food, tech, fashion, fitness, real estate, wellness, service-based, and product-based businesses.

faq.question: Do you provide analytics for marketing campaigns?
faq.answer: Yes — monthly performance reports are included in SMM and ad management packages.

faq.question: How will I receive final files?
faq.answer: Through cloud delivery in high-quality export formats.

faq.question: Do you offer SEO services?
faq.answer: Yes — we provide on-page optimization, SEO-ready content, and website SEO setup.

faq.question: Can Graphura improve my existing website?
faq.answer: Yes — we can redesign, upgrade, optimize, or restructure your existing site.

faq.question: How do you ensure design originality?
faq.answer: All work is created from scratch following brand guidelines — we do not use plagiarized content.

faq.question: How do I start working with Graphura?
faq.answer: Simply contact us through the website, share your requirements, and our team will schedule a call and prepare a proposal.

faq.question: How do you measure campaign success?
faq.answer: Through engagement, reach, keywords, CTR, conversions, and ROI metrics depending on your objectives.

faq.question: What makes Graphura different from other branding agencies?
faq.answer: Our focus on personalized strategies, international-level quality, fast delivery, and complete brand ecosystem solutions sets us apart.

faq.question: What is Graphura and where is it located?
faq.answer: Graphura India Private Limited is a branding, marketing, and custom software solutions company based in Gurugram, Haryana, serving primarily international clients.

faq.question: Where can I find official information about the internship?
faq.answer: Official internship details are available on https://www.graphura.online/internship.html or graphura.in and Graphura’s LinkedIn and Instagram pages.

faq.question: How do I apply for an internship?
faq.answer: You can apply through the official application form at https://www.graphura.online/apply.html. Ensure your resume and portfolio are ready before applying.

faq.question: What are the official HR or support emails?
faq.answer: HR email: hr@graphura.in. Official communication email: official@graphura.in. Use these emails for formal communication.

faq.question: Who should I contact if onboarding is not clear?
faq.answer: You should contact your assigned Team Head first. If the issue is not resolved, escalate to HR at hr@graphura.in following the official reporting hierarchy.

faq.question: From where can I apply for leave?
faq.answer: You can apply for leave using the official leave form at https://www.graphura.online/form/leave.html.

faq.question: How long are Graphura internships?
faq.answer: Graphura internships typically run between 3 to 6 months depending on the domain and offer details.

faq.question: Which internship domains are available at Graphura?
